canonical_definition: An obfuscated version of the Blocksworld planning domain from the PlanBench suite, designed to be more challenging by obscuring the commonsense nature of the task.
papers: HyperTree Planning: Enhancing LLM Reasoning via Hierarchical Thinking
RE-IMAGINE: Symbolic Benchmark Synthesis for Reasoning Evaluation
